playbook.intent: New provider/model dropped → onboard as routable target without changing call sites.
playbook.scope: Onboard a new provider/model (e.g. new Sonnet, Gemini point release, local Ollama) as a routable target without changing call sites. ~half-day per model.

success-criteria.criterion: Eval run on the new backend

stage.name: Wrap
stage.intent: Wire adapter behind unchanged call sites.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when call sites are unchanged.

stage.name: Route
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when policy change is reviewable.

stage.name: Bench & Pin
stage.decision-gate: Ship only when bench passes and rollback is one-line.

extra.value: [Building the gateway itself — see `multi-model-gateway-migration-portability`, Bench against the new model — separate playbook]
[Existing gateway adapter, Eval suite green on current backends]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content model-gateway-endpoint-addition --format md, agent: faion get-content model-gateway-endpoint-addition --format context, json: faion get-content model-gateway-endpoint-addition --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
